compiled_state.title: CI-script-tests: implementation-plan task template missing plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ artifact path -> test-implementation-plan-contracts.sh fails
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
test-implementation-plan-contracts.sh fails: test_contract_task_template asserts that 'plugins/dso/docs/contracts/' artifact path is present in the implementation-plan task template, but the path is not found.

## Expected Behavior
The implementation-plan task template should reference the contracts directory for artifact validation.

## Actual Behavior
The expected path reference is missing from the template.

## Evidence
CI run 24319865314 (2026-04-13), Script Tests job: 6 pass, 1 fail.
